title: Kasba Patāspur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kasba Patāspur with a Z-Score of +5.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kasba Patāspur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 17.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is 16.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
